2606.27527.title: Large Language Model Teaches Visual Students: Cross-Modality Transfer of Fine-Grained Conceptual Knowledge
2606.27527.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) possess broad conceptual knowledge acquired through large-scale text pretraining, yet their potential to supervise models in other modalities remains underexplored. In this work, we propose LaViD--Language-to-Visual Knowledge Distillation--a simple and effective framework for transferring high-level semantic knowledge from a language-only teacher to a vision-only student model. Instead of relying on paired multimodal data, LaViD elicits conceptual signals from an LLM by prompting it to generate multiple-choice questions (MCQs) that probe semantic distinctions between visual classes. Each class is mapped to a soft label distribution over these MCQs, forming a rich conceptual signature that guides the student through an auxiliary distillation loss. Notably, despite using a language-only teacher without access to image data, LaViD consistently outperforms recent methods like MaKD that distill from vision-language models across multiple fine-grained benchmarks. It also achieves competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art visual distillation methods such as DKD and MLKD, with further gains when combined with logit standardization. On the Waterbirds dataset, LaViD substantially improves worst-group accuracy, demonstrating enhanced robustness to spurious correlations with distillation. Code is available at https://github.com/lliangthomas/lavid.
2606.27527.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）擁有通過大規模文本預訓練獲得的廣泛概念知識，但它們在其他模態中監督模型的潛力仍然未被充分探索。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了LaViD——語言到視覺知識蒸餾——這是一個簡單而有效的框架，用於將高階語義知識從僅語言教師轉移到僅視覺學生模型。<lb/>LaViD不是依賴配對的多模態數據，而是通過促使LLM生成多選題（MCQs）來引出概念信號，這些問題探討視覺類別之間的語義區別。<lb/>每個類別都映射到這些多選題上的軟標籤分佈，形成一個豐富的概念簽名，通過輔助蒸餾損失指導學生。<lb/>值得注意的是，儘管使用了一個僅語言的教師且無法訪問圖像數據，LaViD仍然在多個細粒度基準上穩定地超越了最近的方法，如MaKD，這些方法是從視覺-語言模型中進行蒸餾的。<lb/>與最先進的視覺蒸餾方法如DKD和MLKD相比，它也達到了競爭性或更優的性能，並在與邏輯標準化結合時進一步提升。<lb/>在Waterbirds數據集上，LaViD顯著提高了最差組的準確性，展示了在蒸餾過程中對虛假相關性的增強魯棒性。<lb/>代碼可在https://github.com/lliangthomas/lavid獲得。
2606.27527.author: Thomas Shih-Chao Liang et.al.
2606.27527.authors: Thomas Shih-Chao Liang, Zhuoran Yu, Yong Jae Lee
